title: The Destroyed Army's Howling Engraving
overview: A stranger breaks into the temple, defeating everyone who faces him by himself. He's after the sword - "Kenkaranpu". But why is he so desperate to get it? And will Taitou and his sister be able to stop him?

title: Military Song of Karma
overview: The fight continues with the mysterious enemy, and the big adventure truly begins.

title: Honorable Pledge
overview: The group visit a small town with a huge boulder looming dangerously over the cliff above it. But that's not the only danger, the goverment officals are corrupt and don't care about the people. Will the group be able to stop both? And who is "Koyo"?

title: The Five Divine Warriors
overview: The group meets a strange boy, all the arrows and bows he use explode because of the energy put into them. Who exactly is he and which side is he on?

title: The Diseased Empire
overview: The group meet some orphans, who have to steal to live. Unfortunately, they've angered some thugs who are known to kill anyone who try and face them. Will the group be able to protect the orphans?

title: Crimson Hero
overview: Hosei feels ignored when his master takes a special interest in training Taito, so the young archer picks a fight with a gang of bandits who refuse to die - no matter how many times he kills them!

title: The Sorrow of the Rokuson
overview: Hosei's rash behavior causes his master to become an undead servant of evil. With his new friends' lives on the line, will he be able to obey her chilling final order?

title: Echoes in the Valley..
overview: Sensing Hosei's pain over the loss of his master, the heroes embark on a mission to lift his spirits. While Taito and Ryuko try their luck as hunters, Laila collects mushrooms in an attempt to conjure up something edible.

title: The Shadows Cast Upon the Capital
overview: The empire undergoes frightening changes after Keiro stakes his claim to the throne. When the former emperor is imprisoned, Taito and company must act quickly to save him.

title: The Lonely Emperor
overview: Spurred by delusions of grandeur, Taito infiltrates the royal palace, determined to teach the emperor how to run a country - or claim the throne for himself!

title: Hokushinkiki
overview: Lord Keiro's grotesque appetite for power turned him into a bloodthirsty monster. Only Taito can stop him, but he'll need to draw strength from his friends to survive the final showdown!

title: The Moonlight`s Sparkle
overview: Ryuko seeks the council of his elders as he struggles to determine his role in the prophesized battle, and Chouka makes an aggressive attempt to eliminate Taito.

title: Nitenshinson
overview: When Taito and Keiro meet again on the field of battle, Ryuko must decide whether he will fight alongside his friend - or his father!

title: Turning Away from the Fierce Fang
overview: Know what this is about?  Be the first one to add a plot.

title: The Hagun's path
overview: Know what this is about?  Be the first one to add a plot.

title: The Imperial Tonrou
overview: Having fallen under the control of his father's rapidly-expanding influence, Ryuko is powerless to stop his own body from launching a murderous attack against Taito.

title: Bond of Father and Son
overview: Know what this is about?  Be the first one to add a plot.

title: Rentsuuji Aflame
overview: Know what this is about?  Be the first one to add a plot.

title: Division of the Stars
overview: Lord Keiro gains even more power after his daughter's marriage to the Emperor is made official. Elsewhere, Taito and company cross paths with an old friend.

title: The Beginning of Turmoil
overview: Know what this is about?  Be the first one to add a plot.

title: White Rage of Grief
overview: Shimei lures Taito into the clutches of Lord Keiro. The Alkaid is ready for a fight, but his counterpart is unwilling, instead choosing to reveal the secrets of his own dark past.
